summary: Ingested the user-reported native/human German review pass. Refreshed per-locale return files to current resources, refreshed LQA/dashboard artifacts, marked only German as native-reviewed with 419 accepted entries, preserved prior LLM-draft provenance, updated German resource headers and translation-quality docs, and left all other non-English locales unreviewed.
validations_passed: xcodebuild build -quiet -project owlory_xcode/Owlory.xcodeproj -scheme Owlory -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -derivedDataPath /tmp/owlory-native-review-build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO

contract_status_changes.before: All 18 non-English locale return files had provenance.native_reviewed=false and German had 372 stale tracked entries, with new app localization keys missing from the return file.
contract_status_changes.after: All 18 return files are refreshed to 419 entries. German has provenance.native_reviewed=true and 419 native-reviewed entries based on the user-reported human/native German review pass. The other 17 locales remain provenance.native_reviewed=false.

contract_status_changes.before: German Localizable.strings and Localizable.stringsdict headers said the values were LLM-drafted and not native-reviewed.
contract_status_changes.after: German resource headers state that values originated as LLM drafts and were accepted by user-reported native/human German review on 2026-05-18.

residual_risks: German native review is recorded from the user's project-owner report; the individual reviewer's personal name or vendor identity was not provided.
No running-app smoke, screenshot proof, device proof, or TestFlight proof was performed in this slice.
The other 17 non-English locales remain LLM-drafted and not native-reviewed.
The required build still reports the pre-existing TodayView onChange(of:perform:) iOS 17 deprecation warning; this slice did not touch that path.
recommended_next_reason: Supervisor dry-run after marking this slice done reported: stop: no eligible queued slice found.
